lead_signal.headline: Israel announced a ten-day ceasefire with Lebanon amid ongoing southern Lebanon operations, but vowed to maintain troops and a security zone, signaling limited de-escalation.

conflict_updates.title: Israel-Lebanon ten-day ceasefire announced
conflict_updates.summary: Israel declared a ten-day ceasefire with Lebanon following bombardments that killed over 2,000 and displaced more than one million. However, Israeli troops will remain in southern Lebanon to enforce a 10km security zone, with plans to demolish border buildings. This indicates partial de-escalation in Hezbollah-related tensions but sustained military posture.

sources_cited.excerpt: "Israel has announced a ten-day ceasefire with Lebanon... Israeli troops in southern Lebanon to create a ten-kilometre 'security zone'"

weekly_brief_narrative: Israel's announcement of a ten-day ceasefire with Lebanon represents the week's dominant signal in Iran regional tensions, as it partially halts bombardments killing over 2,000 but entrenches a 10km security zone with troop retention and building demolitions, questioning durability amid Hezbollah dynamics. Russia-Ukraine maintains stable high-intensity posture, with US policy papers advocating nuclear theatre enhancements like SLCM-N without operational shifts; Trump-Witkoff framework tracking continues without breakthrough. Gaza persists in urban warfare baseline with episodic Qatar/Egypt mediations de-weighted as structural I5. Sudan SAF/RSF stalemate sustains extreme I6 displacement velocity per IDMC reset, with no de-escalation. Myanmar junta faces ongoing territorial fragmentation from ethnic offensives, lagged reporting confirms I2 persistence. DRC Eastern M23/FARDC clashes escalate via coltan economic coercion, tagging GMM implications. Displacement highlights include 1M+ in southern Lebanon and Sudan's entrenched flows; humanitarian corridors unchanged. Coming week: monitor Israel-Lebanon ceasefire adherence for breakdown risks; Sudan RSF drone extensions beyond baseline; Myanmar junta rhetoric spikes requiring dual-source check; DRC mineral disruptions; Russia nuclear doctrine episodic flags; Haiti gang control nearing 80% threshold.
